---
title: "Troubleshooting"
---

# Troubleshooting

## "Dataset not found"

The dataset hasn't been pushed yet. Run:

```bash
uv run langsmith-dataset dataset push \
  dataset-tenant-legal-qa-examples.jsonl \
  tenant-legal-qa-scenarios
```

## Scores seem wrong or inconsistent

LLM-as-judge has its own biases and can be inconsistent on borderline cases. Review
the judge's written rationale for specific failing examples in the LangSmith UI, then
refine the evaluator rubrics in `evaluators/*.md` if the scoring logic is the problem
(see [Editing evaluator rubrics](../editing-and-results/evaluator-rubrics.qmd)).

For a systematic breakdown of agent vs. evaluator noise, see
[Understanding Scores → diagnosing score variance](understanding-scores.qmd#diagnosing-score-variance).

## Evaluation is too slow

Pass `--max-concurrency 3` (or higher) to run multiple examples in parallel, or
temporarily reduce the dataset size in LangSmith to evaluate a representative subset.
